name: Triage sub-agent — classifies a mixed inbox into the four buckets
description: Targets the workspace sub-agent directly (NOT the main coach). The AgentTool wrapper hands it a JSON message `{"since":"1d"}` and the sub-agent must (a) call list_inbox once, (b) call get_messages once for the ids (4 messages stubbed: newsletter / action / event / info), (c) emit a final <TRIAGE_REPORT>{json}</TRIAGE_REPORT> with one item per bucket. Tool calls are mocked via `before_tool_callback` in `eval_triage_inbox_agent.py` so the run is deterministic / free of real Gmail. Final-response check asserts the TRIAGE_REPORT marker is present; the sub-agent's classification quality is the LLM-judge surface.
